headline: Is Airbnb (ABNB) the Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In?
summary: Airbnb, Inc. (NASDAQ:ABNB) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 24, 2026, Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, Business Affairs and Consumer Protection Commissioner Ivan Capifali, and Corporation Counsel Mary B.
